nasb.text: There will no longer be any curse; and the throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it, and His bond-servants will serve Him;

esv.text: No longer will there be anything accursed, but the throne of God and of the Lamb will be in it, and his servants will worship him.

cnv.text: 所有咒詛都不再有了。城裡有　神和羊羔的寶座，他的僕人都要事奉他，

ccb.text: 再也没有咒诅，因为城里有上帝和羔羊的宝座，祂的奴仆都要事奉祂。

csbs.text: 将来不再有任何诅咒。神和羔羊的宝座将要在城中，他的奴仆们将事奉他，
